name: Pack Of 12: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned - Turkey & Duck Chunks in Jelly 400g
description: Reflex Plus Turkey & Duck Adult Cat Canned Food (Pack of 12) , fully-balanced, turkey & duck protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 9.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.5 Moisture (%) -?80 Crude Ash (%) - 3.0 Vitamin A (Min) -?1400 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) -?180 IE/kg Iron -?8 mg/kg Copper -?1.2 mg/kg Iodine -?0.21 mg/kg Manganese -?1.6 mg/kg Zinc -?8.0 mg/kg Selenium -?0.02 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and Animal Derivatives (Duck 4%, Turkey 4%), Minerals. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day, where 1 can serves 2 meals. Individual needs depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
